    N

    name - Variable in class product.Category
    The category's name
    NEW_SECONDHAND_PRODUCT - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
    Notifications related to new second-hand products
    nextPageCartPack(Cart) - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs
    nextPageCategory() - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of categories
    nextPageCategory(List) - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a list of categories
    nextPageDiscount() - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of discounts
    nextPageEmployee() - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of employees
    nextPagePrinterCategory(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of categories
    nextPagePrinterDiscount(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of discounts
    nextPagePrinterEmployee(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of employees
    nextPagePrinterRegisteredClient(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of registered clients
    nextPagePrinterReview(int, StoreProduct) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a store product's list of reviews
    nextPagePrinterStorePack(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of packs
    nextPagePrinterStoreProduct(int, List) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a list of store products
    nextPageRegisteredClient() - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of registered clients
    nextPageRegisteredClient(List) - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a list of registered clients
    nextPageReview(StoreProduct) - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a store product's list of reviews
    nextPageStorePack() - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs
    nextPageStoreProduct(List) - Method in class main.Loop
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a list of store products
    notification - package notification
    This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
    Notification - Class in notification
    It implements the notification
    Notification(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.Notification
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    Notification(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.Notification
    Creates a new notification
    Notification(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.Notification
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationDiscount - Class in notification
    It implements the discount notification
    NotificationDiscount(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationDiscount
    Creates a new discount notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationDiscount(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationDiscount
    Creates a new discount notification
    NotificationDiscount(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationDiscount
    Creates a new discount notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationEmployeeExchange - Class in notification
    It implements the exchange notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeExchange(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationEmployeeExchange(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeExchange(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationEmployeeOrder - Class in notification
    It implements the order notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeOrder(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeOrder
    Creates a new order notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationEmployeeOrder(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeOrder
    Creates a new order notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeOrder(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeOrder
    Creates a new order notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationEmployeeValuation - Class in notification
    It implements the valuation notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeValuation(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeValuation
    Creates a new valuation notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationEmployeeValuation(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeValuation
    Creates a new valuation notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeValuation(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationEmployeeValuation
    Creates a new valuation notification for employees with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationExchange - Class in notification
    It implements the exchange notification
    NotificationExchange(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, String, LocalDateTime, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationExchange(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, String, LocalDateTime, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification
    NotificationExchange(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification with no address or timeAndDate
    NotificationExchange(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification without address or timeAndDate
    NotificationExchange(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType, String, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationExchange
    Creates a new exchange notification without title and text
    NotificationHistory - Class in notification
    It implements the notification history
    NotificationHistory(Set, User) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationHistory
    Creates a new notification history
    NotificationHistory(Set, User, NotificationSettings) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationHistory
    Creates a new notification history
    NotificationHistory(User) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationHistory
    Creates a new empty notification history
    NotificationHistory(User, NotificationSettings) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationHistory
    Creates a new empty notification history
    NotificationInterface<T> - Interface in notification
    /** It implements the notification interface
    NotificationNewSecondHand - Class in notification
    It implements the new second-hand product notification
    NotificationNewSecondHand(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationNewSecondHand
    Creates a new second-hand notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationNewSecondHand(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationNewSecondHand
    Creates a new second-hand notification
    NotificationNewSecondHand(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationNewSecondHand
    Creates a new second-hand notification
    NotificationOrder - Class in notification
    It implements the order notification
    NotificationOrder(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationOrder
    Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationOrder(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationOrder
    Creates a new order notification
    NotificationOrder(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationOrder
    Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationPackCart - Class in notification
    It implements the cart notification for packs
    NotificationPackCart(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPackCart
    Creates a new cart notification for packs with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationPackCart(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPackCart
    Creates a new cart notification for packs
    NotificationPackCart(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPackCart
    Creates a new cart notification for packs with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationPayment - Class in notification
    It implements the payment notification
    NotificationPayment(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPayment
    Creates a new payment notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationPayment(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPayment
    Creates a new payment notification
    NotificationPayment(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationPayment
    Creates a new payment notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationProductCart - Class in notification
    It implements the cart notification for products
    NotificationProductCart(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationProductCart
    Creates a new cart notification for products with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationProductCart(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationProductCart
    Creates a new cart notification for products
    NotificationProductCart(LocalDateTime, boolean, boolean, NotificationType) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationProductCart
    Creates a new cart notification for products with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
    NotificationSettings - Class in notification
    It implements the notification settings
    NotificationSettings() - Constructor for class notification.NotificationSettings
    Creates a new setting
    NotificationSettings(HashMap) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationSettings
    Creates a new setting for the notifications
    NotificationSettings(User) - Constructor for class notification.NotificationSettings
    Creates a new settings based on the type of user
    NotificationType - Enum Class in notification
    It defines the types of notifications
